components.notes: Single subagent; no MCP/LSP/hooks. Only other tree file is plugin.json.

codex.rationale: Codex has no plugin subagent surface and curated third-party plugins are not in Codex's fan-out; reimplement the behavior as a Lisa skill.

cursor.rationale: Cursor reads .claude-plugin/ natively; the agent loads unchanged.

agy.rationale: Curated third-party plugins are not in agy's fan-out, so agy receives nothing natively; reimplement as a Lisa skill.

actions: enable Copilot's native code-simplification/refactor capability for the code-simplifier agent in the project-scoped marketplace
copilot.rationale: Code simplification is a generic capability Copilot ships natively; prefer enabling over reimplementing.
